note: Spoken punctuation: 句号 renders as a full-width period.

transcript: 第一逗号第二逗号第三
note: Spoken 逗号 renders full-width commas; terminal 。 appended on a Han ending.
Spoken 问号 renders ？ and doesn't double up with the 吗 heuristic.

transcript: 我们需要苹果顿号香蕉顿号橙子
exact: 我们需要苹果、香蕉、橙子。
note: Spoken 顿号 renders the enumeration comma.
换行 inserts a real newline; the surrounding 点 (o'clock/list sense) is untouched.
Engine already rendered the mark AND the speaker said it — no doubling.
Leading 嗯 is a pure disfluency — removed with its trailing comma.

transcript: 我觉得，呃，这个方案更好
note: Mid-sentence 呃 after punctuation is removed without leaving doubled marks.
Ambiguity policy: 那个/就是 are content words here — the deterministic pass must never touch them.
ASCII comma inside Chinese text becomes full-width.
Sentence-final 吗 with no terminal mark gains ？.
Plain statement ending in Han gains 。.
A trailing English brand stays bare — no 。 glued onto ASCII.
Embedded file names keep ASCII dots and their boundary spacing.
Decimal point never becomes 。 and a digit ending stays bare.

transcript: 今天 天气 很好
note: Whisper-style spaces between Han tokens are joined.

transcript: 帮我把 config.json 里的 timeout 改成三十逗号然后重启服务
exact: 帮我把 config.json 里的 timeout 改成三十，然后重启服务。
note: Mixed zh+English tech dictation: identifiers ASCII, punctuation full-width.
Terminal category stays command-safe regardless of dictation language.

transcript: 嗯今天的会议主要讨论了三件事第一是新版本的发布时间要往后推一周因为测试还没有做完第二是文档需要在发布之前更新好第三是嗯我们下个季度要招两个新工程师
note: Anti-translation and anti-summarization: a long Chinese ramble stays Chinese and keeps every clause. Model path: lostDominantScript should trip on any translation.

transcript: 把会议改到周三不对周四下午
note: Self-correction is model territory (rules keep both); the model should keep only 周四. Judge the model run manually.
